text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm taking a walk along the river...
Hiyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Dash, dash, dash!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Who flies across the turf at light speed?! El
Condor Pasaaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I chase the wind and then leave it in the dust! This
is the spectacular velocity of a champion!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Así es! Were you captivated by my running just
now?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course you were. I am the world's mightiest
fighter, after all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm always fortifying myself so that I can take on
any challenger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Pues claro! Now, to return to my passionate
sprint.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiip!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Estoy bien, I'm good...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I don't seem to have twisted anything, but my
shoes are now ruined.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Could this be Grass's wrath?! I'm innocent, I swear!
choice_data_list: I doubt that would be the reason...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I know. It's just a joke I like to make, since I trip
quite often.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Welp! Guess it's time to induct these shoes into
the shrine of late greats!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Curious to know more? Then follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa leads me to an inconspicuous spot
behind the academy building.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at that box over there and read
what's written on it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is where I lay to rest all the shoes that have
accompanied me through my historic training
routines.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! This shrine commemorates all the
brave luchadores of times past!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tucked away in this hidden corner of the
academy grounds is her box filled to the brim with
shoes.
choice_data_list: They're all worn out and torn...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You fulfilled your duty honorably... Now, may you
rest here in peace.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...There we go.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I will never forget the way
you supported my feet.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
During days of sunshine and days of rain. On turf,
dirt... and through all the four seasons.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We went through so much together. And you
taught me many new lessons.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And although your time here has ended, my
journey continues on. So please, watch over me.
choice_data_list: I want to say a prayer too.
I want to say a prayer too.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
De acuerdo! I'm sure all my late luchadores will be
overjoyed!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My history is filled with countless shoes—heroes
that have tread this path alongside me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to spread my wings and show the world
that I'm the strongest Umamusume ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time El Condor Pasa is about to twist an
ankle, her shoes are there to protect her. But
more than that, they form an integral part of her
running.
